name: @hia-doc/hia-tsdoc-workspace
description: Workspace for HIA TypeScript/TSDoc documentation packages.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check scripts/check-skeleton.cjs && node --check scripts/check-license-audit.cjs && node --check scripts/release-check.cjs
scripts.release:gate: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:skeleton && npm run license:audit && npm run release:check && npm pack --dry-run --json
